mapper.select: SELECT t.type_code AS typeCode, t.type_name AS typeName, t.par_type_code AS parTypeCode, p.type_name AS parTypeName, t.project_code AS projectCode, pr.project_name AS projectName FROM types t LEFT OUTER JOIN types p ON t.par_type_code = p.type_code LEFT OUTER JOIN projects pr ON t.project_code = pr.project_code WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VW_USER_PROJECT_AUTH v WHERE v.user_code = #{userCode} AND v.project_code = t.project_code AND ( (v.role_code = 1 AND pr.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.role_code = 2 AND pr.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY NVL(p.type_name, t.type_name), t.type_name

SELECT t.type_code AS typeCode, t.type_name AS typeName, t.par_type_code AS parTypeCode, p.type_name AS parTypeName, t.project_code AS projectCode FROM types t LEFT OUTER JOIN types p ON t.par_type_code = p.type_code WHERE t.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY NVL(p.type_name, t.type_name), t.type_name

SELECT t.type_code AS typeCode, t.type_name AS typeName, t.par_type_code AS parTypeCode, p.type_name AS parTypeName, t.project_code AS projectCode, pr.project_name AS projectName, t.end_at AS endAt, t.start_at AS startAt FROM types t LEFT OUTER JOIN types p ON t.par_type_code = p.type_code LEFT OUTER JOIN projects pr ON t.project_code = pr.project_code WHERE t.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY NVL(p.type_name, t.type_name), t.type_name
